markdown.markdown:
Briana Maximino

Marketing student focused on sports marketing, brand strategy, and consumer engagement analytics.

View Portfolio View Resume
My work explores how organizations strengthen brand relevance and consumer engagement through strategic marketing thinking, behavioral insight analysis, and experiential campaign concepts. I am particularly interested in sports marketing, brand strategy, and consumer-focused campaign development. ## Portfolio Overview This portfolio presents marketing analyses and campaign strategy concepts developed through academic research and applied business frameworks. Core areas include: • Campaign strategy development • Brand positioning analysis • Organizational and corporate evaluation • Consumer behavior integration • Marketing communication strategy ## Professional Development Through academic projects and independent learning, I have developed experience applying marketing frameworks to real-world business contexts. My goal is to contribute strategic thinking and analytical support within dynamic marketing teams. ## Marketing Impact Perspective I approach marketing strategy with an emphasis on measurable outcomes and long-term brand value. This includes evaluating how marketing initiatives influence: • Consumer engagement • Brand perception • Audience loyalty • Market competitiveness • Digital interaction effectiveness ## Selected Strategic Work ::: {.grid} ::: {.g-col-6}

LA Galaxy Campaign Strategy

Gen Z engagement and experiential sports marketing concept.

 ::: ::: {.g-col-6}

Tesla Corporate Strategy

Company Analysis on Management and Strategic Initiatives.

 ::: ::: {.g-col-6}

Google Organizational Analysis

Analyzing organizational structure and strategic initiatives.

 ::: ::: {.g-col-6}

Super Soaker Brand Strategy

Student ran business project focused on marketing strategy and brand development.

 ::: ::: ## Career Direction I am seeking opportunities in sports marketing, brand strategy, and consumer engagement analytics to apply my strategic marketing skills within dynamic organizations that value consumer insight, brand development, and innovative campaign thinking.
Marketing strategy is about shaping how people experience brands, connect emotionally, and engage with ideas that influence behavior.
